name: KML Technology Group Limited
summary: KML Technology Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides electrical and mechanical (E&M) engineering solutions and services in Hong Kong, Taiwan, Singapore, Canada, and internationally. The company provides electrical and mechanical engineering solutions and services for transportation mission critical system solutions, such as automatic fare collection system, electronic payment and ticketing system, road and tunnel toll collection system, traffic control and surveillance system, and railway signaling communication and control system. It also offers security and access control system services; railway station electrical and mechanical engineering services, and architectural works, including services in relation to air-conditioning and mechanical ventilation system, fire service system, plumbing and drainage system, and electrical system; and trackside and depot electrical and mechanical engineering works. In addition, the company provides engineering design and fabrication services for the fabrication of made-to-order products, such as control room consoles, public access kiosks and terminals, relay racks, test rigs, control room technical furniture, and industrial enclosures and instrument cabinets. Further, it offers rolling stock refurbishment and modification services; and railway and road transport infrastructure project services, as well as sells railway parts and components. The company serves transportation companies, engineering companies, and governmental departments. KML Technology Group Limited was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Shatin, Hong Kong.
